description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ros2 that runs on push and pull request events to the ros2 branch. The workflow uses an ubuntu-latest environment with a matrix strategy to build ros2 for multiple ROS distributions (humble, jazzy, kilted) in a containerized setup. For each distribution, it checks out the code, sets up ROS, configures dependencies, and runs a ROS CI action to build the rtabmap_ros package.
